overview: A mobile-responsive AI Quiz Application with teacher and student roles. Teachers can create quizzes manually or use AI simulation to generate them from a topic. Students can browse available quizzes, attempt them one question at a time, and see their score at the end.
features: Login screen with Teacher/Student role selection
Teacher dashboard with Create Quiz and Generate Quiz (AI) buttons
Quiz builder with title, multiple questions, 4-option answers, and correct answer marking
AI-simulated quiz generation from a topic input with mock data
Quiz attempt screen showing one question at a time with multiple choice answers
Results screen displaying score after submission
Local state management with Zustand and mock data
